title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track days in advance in October 2025, enabling early evacuation warnings. The model provides high-confidence meteorological signals for tropical storms and hurricanes by capturing their rapid structural changes.
